title: Address Element
excerpt: Use the Address Element to collect complete billing and shipping addresses for in-app integrations. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [iOS](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/address-element.md?platform=ios) - [Android](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/address-element.md?platform=android) - [React Native](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/mobile/address-element.md?platform=react-native)
